GB 19044一2022
GB 19415一2013 .4.1 of GB 29144一2012,4.1 of GB 29142一2012);

d) Deleted the calculation of Iuminous efficacy for self-ballasted fluorescent lamps(See 4.2.1 of
GB 19044一2013) ;

e) Deleted the rule to determine the Iluminous efficacy of products whose rated power value is not
listed by linear interpolation method for self-ballasted fluorescent induction lamps(See 4.3 of
GB 29144一2012) ;

和 Deleted "Requirement on evaluating values of energy conservation”for self-ballasted fluorescent
lamps,double-capped fluorescent lamps, single-capped fluorescent lamps, self-ballasted fluores-
cent induction lamps and single-capped fluorescent induction lamps (See 4.4 of GB 19044一2013，
4.4 of GB 19043一2013.4.3 of GB 19415一2013 ,4.5 of GB 29144一2012.4.5 of GB 29142一2012) ;

g) Added “Requirement on color rendering index”for fluorescent lamps using triband phosphor(See
4.4).

This document was proposed and prepared by Standardization Administration .

The previous editions of the documents replaced by this document are as follows:

一GB 19044 ,the first edition was issued in 2003,revised in 2013;

一This is the second revised edition ,and the entire texts of GB 19043一2013 (the first edition was
issued in 2003,revised in 2013) ,GB 19415一2013 (the first edition was issued in 2003,revised in
2013) ,GB 29144一2012 and GB 29142一2012 were amalgamated.

TY
